#Get Parameter from controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "SharePoint_Silver"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
source_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage container detail
source_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #internal folder location in container "demodata/demo_aemo"
#source_file = '' #CUSTOMER__full_32a72bd2-bd94-467f-9030-6b9f20dad676_20240204_100201

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch

#Get Current Date
Silver_LoadDate=spark.sql("select current_timestamp()").collect()[0][0]

# Display values
print(source_storage)
print(source_container)
print(source_path)
print(destination_storage)
print(destination_container)
print(destination_path)

#lACIMA load dates
df_Lacima_loaddate = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT date_format(CDC_LoadDate,'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSSSS') AS LoadDate FROM
                            (SELECT DISTINCT CDC_LoadDate FROM lacima_bronze.rasimulationsetoutputvalue
                            ORDER BY CDC_LoadDate DESC
                            LIMIT 2)
                        ORDER BY CDC_LoadDate DESC;
                    """)
Lacima_current_loaddate = df_Lacima_loaddate.collect()[0][0]
Lacima_previous_loaddate = df_Lacima_loaddate.collect()[1][0]

#Create Bronze Table

spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    ID INT,
    SPM_NameHashId STRING,
    StationName STRING,
    Capacity DOUBLE,
    StartDate DATE,
    EndDate DATE,
    MLF DOUBLE,
    AuxiliaryLoss DOUBLE,
    NumberOfUnits DOUBLE, 
    Duration INT,
    FileName STRING,
    Lacima_loaddate TIMESTAMP
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Get latest and historical recoreds
df_silver = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT ID, SPM_NameHashKey,  StationName, Capacity, StartDate, EndDate, MLF, AuxiliaryLoss, NumberOfUnits, Duration, FileName, '{Lacima_current_loaddate}' AS Lacima_Loaddate, CDC_StartDate, CDC_ENDDate
                        FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                        WHERE CDC_CurrentFlag = 1
                        UNION
                        SELECT ID, SPM_NameHashKey,  StationName, Capacity, StartDate, EndDate, MLF, AuxiliaryLoss, NumberOfUnits, Duration, FileName, Lacima_Loaddate, CDC_StartDate, CDC_ENDDate
                        FROM (SELECT ID, SPM_NameHashKey,  StationName, Capacity, StartDate, EndDate, MLF, AuxiliaryLoss, NumberOfUnits, Duration, FileName, '{Lacima_previous_loaddate}'AS Lacima_Loaddate, CDC_StartDate, CDC_ENDDate,
                                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SPM_NameHashKey ORDER BY CDC_StartDate desc) AS row_num 
                                FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                                WHERE CDC_StartDate < '{Lacima_current_loaddate}') as historyload
                        WHERE historyload.row_num = 1
                    """)
#display(df_silver)

# Create a temporary view
df_silver_previous = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT ID, SPM_NameHashKey AS SPM_NameHashId,  StationName, Capacity, StartDate, EndDate, MLF, AuxiliaryLoss, NumberOfUnits, Duration, FileName, '{Lacima_previous_loaddate}', CDC_StartDate, CDC_ENDDate,
                        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SPM_NameHashKey ORDER BY CDC_StartDate desc) AS row_num 
                        FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                        WHERE CDC_StartDate < '{Lacima_current_loaddate}'
                    """)

display(df_silver_previous)

# Add Hash columns
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp, to_date, when
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws, regexp_replace

# New HashId key required for historical load
#df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("SPM_NameHashIdvalue", concat_ws("||", "ID","Lacima_Loaddate"))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("SPM_NameHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||", "ID","Lacima_Loaddate"), 256))


# Replace NULL values in usage
df_silver = df_silver.na.fill({"Capacity":0})
df_silver = df_silver.na.fill({"AuxiliaryLoss":0})
df_silver = df_silver.na.fill({"MLF":0})
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("StartDate",when(col("StartDate").isNull(), to_date(lit("9999-12-31"), 'yyyy-MM-dd')).otherwise(col("StartDate")))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("EndDate",when(col("EndDate").isNull(), to_date(lit("9999-12-31"), 'yyyy-MM-dd')).otherwise(col("EndDate")))

#display(df_silver)

# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
df_silver.createOrReplaceTempView(f"""Silver_temp_{db_tablename}""")

# Use insert operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
            INSERT INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
            SELECT      ID, 
                        SPM_NameHashId,  
                        StationName, 
                        Capacity, 
                        StartDate, 
                        EndDate, 
                        MLF, 
                        AuxiliaryLoss, 
                        NumberOfUnits, 
                        Duration,
                        FileName,
                        Lacima_Loaddate

            FROM Silver_temp_{db_tablename}
        """)

spark.sql(f"""
            DROP VIEW IF EXISTS Silver_temp_{db_tablename}

# Duplication count
Silver_duplicate_count= spark.sql(f"""
                                        SELECT sum(dCount)
                                        FROM (
                                                SELECT COUNT(SPM_NameHashId) AS dCount FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                                                GROUP by SPM_NameHashId
                                                HAVING COUNT(SPM_NameHashId)>1 ) as subtb
                                    
                            """).collect()[0][0]
assert Silver_duplicate_count == None
print(Silver_duplicate_count)

#Row count parameters
Silver_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Silver_LoadDate,Silver_TotalRows,0,0,Silver_TotalRows,Silver_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)
#display(df_test)

#Write to controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")

#Create Bronze Table

spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    ID INT,
    SPM_CategoryHashId STRING,
    Category1 STRING,
    Category2 STRING,
    Category3 STRING,
    Category4 STRING,
    Category5 STRING,
    Category6 STRING,
    FileName STRING,
    Lacima_loaddate TIMESTAMP
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Get latest and historical recoreds
df_silver = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT ID,SPM_CategoryHashKey, Category1, Category2, Category3, Category4, Category5, Category6, FileName, '{Lacima_current_loaddate}' AS Lacima_Loaddate, CDC_StartDate, CDC_ENDDate
                        FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                        WHERE CDC_CurrentFlag = 1
                        UNION
                        SELECT ID,SPM_CategoryHashKey, Category1, Category2, Category3, Category4, Category5, Category6, FileName, Lacima_Loaddate, CDC_StartDate, CDC_ENDDate
                        FROM (SELECT ID,SPM_CategoryHashKey, Category1, Category2, Category3, Category4, Category5, Category6, FileName, '{Lacima_previous_loaddate}'AS Lacima_Loaddate, CDC_StartDate, CDC_ENDDate,
                                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SPM_CategoryHashKey ORDER BY CDC_StartDate desc) AS row_num 
                                FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                                WHERE CDC_StartDate < '{Lacima_current_loaddate}') as historyload
                        WHERE historyload.row_num = 1
                    """)
#df_silver = df_silver.orderBy("SPM_CategoryHashKey")
#display(df_silver)

# Create a temporary view
df_silver = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT ID,SPM_CategoryHashKey AS SPM_CategoryHashId, Category1, Category2, Category3, Category4, Category5, Category6, FileName
                        FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                        WHERE CDC_CurrentFlag = 1

# Add Hash columns
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp, to_date, when
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws, regexp_replace

# New HashId key required for historical load
#df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("SPM_CategoryHashIdvalue", concat_ws("||", "ID","Lacima_Loaddate"))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("SPM_CategoryHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||", "ID","Lacima_Loaddate"), 256))


#display(df_silver)

# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
df_silver.createOrReplaceTempView(f"""Silver_temp_{db_tablename}""")

# Use insert operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
            INSERT INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
            SELECT      ID,
                        SPM_CategoryHashId, 
                        Category1, 
                        Category2, 
                        Category3, 
                        Category4, 
                        Category5, 
                        Category6, 
                        FileName,
                        Lacima_Loaddate
            FROM Silver_temp_{db_tablename}
        """)

spark.sql(f"""
            DROP VIEW IF EXISTS Silver_temp_{db_tablename}

# Duplication count
Silver_duplicate_count= spark.sql(f"""
                                        SELECT sum(dCount)
                                        FROM (
                                                SELECT COUNT(SPM_CategoryHashId) AS dCount FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                                                GROUP by SPM_CategoryHashId
                                                HAVING COUNT(SPM_CategoryHashId)>1 ) as subtb
                                    
                            """).collect()[0][0]
assert Silver_duplicate_count == None
print(Silver_duplicate_count)

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Silver_LoadDate,Silver_TotalRows,0,0,Silver_TotalRows,Silver_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")

#Create Bronze Table

spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    ID INT,
    SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashId STRING,
    RiskFactorNames STRING,
    RiskFactorNamesHashId STRING,
    SPM_Name_ID INT,
    SPM_NameHashId STRING,
    SPM_Category_ID INT,
    SPM_CategoryHashId STRING,
    FileName STRING,
    Lacima_loaddate TIMESTAMP
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Get latest and historical recoreds
df_silver = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT ID, SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashKey, RiskFactorNames, SPM_Name_ID, SPM_Category_ID, FileName, '{Lacima_current_loaddate}' AS Lacima_Loaddate, CDC_StartDate, CDC_ENDDate
                        FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                        WHERE CDC_CurrentFlag = 1
                        AND SPM_Name_ID IS NOT NULL
                        AND SPM_Category_ID IS NOT NULL
                        UNION
                        SELECT ID, SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashKey, RiskFactorNames, SPM_Name_ID, SPM_Category_ID, FileName, Lacima_Loaddate, CDC_StartDate, CDC_ENDDate
                        FROM (SELECT ID, SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashKey, RiskFactorNames, SPM_Name_ID, SPM_Category_ID, FileName, '{Lacima_previous_loaddate}' AS Lacima_Loaddate, CDC_StartDate, CDC_ENDDate,
                                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashKey ORDER BY CDC_StartDate desc) AS row_num 
                                FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                                WHERE CDC_StartDate < '{Lacima_current_loaddate}'
                                AND SPM_Name_ID IS NOT NULL
                                AND SPM_Category_ID IS NOT NULL) as historyload
                        WHERE historyload.row_num = 1
                    """)
#df_silver = df_silver.orderBy("SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashKey")
#display(df_silver)

# Create a temporary view
df_silver = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT ID, SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashKey AS SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashId, RiskFactorNames, SPM_Name_ID, SPM_Category_ID, FileName
                        FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                        WHERE CDC_CurrentFlag = 1
                        AND SPM_Name_ID IS NOT NULL
                        AND SPM_Category_ID IS NOT NULL

# Add Hash columns
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp, to_date, when
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws, regexp_replace

df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("SPM_NameHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||", "SPM_Name_ID","Lacima_Loaddate"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("SPM_CategoryHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||", "SPM_Category_ID","Lacima_Loaddate"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("RiskFactorNamesHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||", "RiskFactorNames","Lacima_Loaddate"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||", "ID","Lacima_Loaddate"), 256))

# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
df_silver.createOrReplaceTempView(f"""Silver_temp_{db_tablename}""")

            INSERT INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}

                        SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashId, 
                        RiskFactorNames,
                        RiskFactorNamesHashId, 
                        SPM_Name_ID, 
                        SPM_NameHashId,
                        SPM_Category_ID,
                        SPM_CategoryHashId,
                        FileName,
                        Lacima_Loaddate
            FROM Silver_temp_{db_tablename}
        """)

spark.sql(f"""
            DROP VIEW IF EXISTS Silver_temp_{db_tablename}

# Duplication count
Silver_duplicate_count= spark.sql(f"""
                                        SELECT sum(dCount)
                                        FROM (
                                                SELECT COUNT(SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashId) AS dCount FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                                                GROUP by SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashId
                                                HAVING COUNT(SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashId)>1 ) as subtb
                                    
                            """).collect()[0][0]
assert Silver_duplicate_count == None
print(Silver_duplicate_count)

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

#Write to controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")

#Create Bronze Table

spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    SPM_Name_ID INT,
    SPM_NameHashId STRING,
    SPM_Category_ID INT,
    SPM_CategoryHashId STRING,
    PeriodsInQuarter INT,
    CalendarYear INT,
    FinancialYear INT,
    Quarter INT,
    StartDate DATE,
    DateHashId STRING,
    EndDate DATE,
    OperatingDays INT,
    SPM_LacimaRiskFactor_ID INT,
    SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashId STRING,
    TotalLevelisedCostRecovery DOUBLE,
    FileName STRING,
    Lacima_Loaddate TIMESTAMP
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Create a temporary view
df_silver = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT SPM_Name_ID, SPM_Category_ID, PeriodsInQuarter, CalendarYear, FinancialYear, Quarter, StartDate, EndDate, OperatingDays, SPM_LacimaRiskFactor_ID, TotalLevelisedCostRecovery, FileName, '{Lacima_current_loaddate}' AS Lacima_Loaddate, CDC_StartDate, CDC_ENDDate
                        FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                        WHERE CDC_CurrentFlag = 1
                        AND SPM_Name_ID IS NOT NULL
                        AND SPM_Category_ID IS NOT NULL
                        AND SPM_LacimaRiskFactor_ID IS NOT NULL                        
                        UNION
                        SELECT SPM_Name_ID, SPM_Category_ID, PeriodsInQuarter, CalendarYear, FinancialYear, Quarter, StartDate, EndDate, OperatingDays, SPM_LacimaRiskFactor_ID, TotalLevelisedCostRecovery, FileName, Lacima_Loaddate, CDC_StartDate, CDC_ENDDate
                        FROM (SELECT SPM_Name_ID, SPM_Category_ID, PeriodsInQuarter, CalendarYear, FinancialYear, Quarter, StartDate, EndDate, OperatingDays, SPM_LacimaRiskFactor_ID, TotalLevelisedCostRecovery, FileName, '{Lacima_previous_loaddate}'AS Lacima_Loaddate, CDC_StartDate, CDC_ENDDate,
                                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SPM_RawFixedCostHashKey ORDER BY CDC_StartDate desc) AS row_num 
                                FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                                WHERE CDC_StartDate < '{Lacima_current_loaddate}') as historyload
                        WHERE historyload.row_num = 1
                        AND SPM_Name_ID IS NOT NULL
                        AND SPM_Category_ID IS NOT NULL
                        AND SPM_LacimaRiskFactor_ID IS NOT NULL

# Add CDC columns
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp, to_date, when, date_format
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws, regexp_replace

#df_gold = df_gold.withColumn("SPM_NameHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||", "ID"), 256))

# Replace NULL values in usage
df_silver = df_silver.na.fill({"TotalLevelisedCostRecovery":0})
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("StartDate",when(col("StartDate").isNull(), to_date(lit("9999-12-31"), 'yyyy-MM-dd')).otherwise(col("StartDate")))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("EndDate",when(col("EndDate").isNull(), to_date(lit("9999-12-31"), 'yyyy-MM-dd')).otherwise(col("EndDate")))


#HashId creation
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("SPM_NameHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||", "SPM_Name_ID","Lacima_Loaddate"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("SPM_CategoryHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||", "SPM_Category_ID","Lacima_Loaddate"), 256))
#df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("DateHashId_value", date_format(col("StartDate"), 'yyyyMMdd'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("DateHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||",date_format(col("StartDate"), 'yyyyMMdd')), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||","SPM_LacimaRiskFactor_ID","Lacima_Loaddate"), 256))

#display(df_silver)

# Display datafram and schema
raw_df.printSchema()
display(raw_df)

df_silver.createOrReplaceTempView(f"""Silver_temp_{db_tablename}""")

spark.sql(f"""
            INSERT INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
            SELECT      SPM_Name_ID,
                        SPM_NameHashId,
                        SPM_Category_ID, 
                        SPM_CategoryHashId,
                        PeriodsInQuarter, 
                        CalendarYear, 
                        FinancialYear, 
                        Quarter, 
                        StartDate,
                        DateHashId, 
                        EndDate, 
                        OperatingDays, 
                        SPM_LacimaRiskFactor_ID,
                        SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashId, 
                        TotalLevelisedCostRecovery, 
                        FileName,
                        Lacima_Loaddate
            FROM Silver_temp_{db_tablename}
        """)

spark.sql(f"""
            DROP VIEW IF EXISTS Silver_temp_{db_tablename}

# Display
print(Bronze_Insert)
print(Bronze_Update)
print(Bronze_Delete)
print(Bronze_ActiveRows)
print(Bronze_TotalRows)

#display(df_test)

#Write to controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
